meta.title: New course with LangChain! Long-Term Agentic Memory with LangGraph
meta.description:
Learn more: https://bit.ly/4kKKTYJ

AI agents are becoming more capable—but without memory, they forget past interactions. In our latest short course built in collaboration with LangChain, Long-Term Agentic Memory with LangGraph, you’ll learn how to build AI agents that store, retrieve, and update memory using LangMem.

Taught by Harrison Chase, Co-Founder & CEO of LangChain, this course walks you through developing a personal email assistant that intelligently manages messages using semantic, episodic, and procedural memory.

- Understand how memory enhances AI agents – Explore the three types of memory (semantic, episodic, and procedural) and how they enable agents to store facts, recall past experiences, and follow evolving instructions.
- Build an AI-powered email assistant – Create an agent that can automatically route, respond to, or schedule emails, adapting its behavior based on past interactions.
- Implement long-term memory with LangMem – Learn how to store and retrieve important details from memory, ensuring your AI agent gets smarter over time instead of starting from scratch.

Start building memory-enhanced AI agents today.

Enroll now: https://bit.ly/4kKKTYJ
